---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "Feature: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve

A clear description of the problem you're trying to solve, not the solution. What's painful today? What would you like to do that you can't?

## Proposed solution

Optional — if you have a specific change in mind, describe it. Otherwise leave blank and we'll discuss.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about? Why did you settle on the proposed one?

## Anything else

Mockups, related issues, references, context.
